title: Xengi'MobPlush
body:
Due to a disagreement between team -  mod will no longer receive updates



# Xengi'MobPlush
**This mod it's simple, but cute.** We made it - and we hope you enjoy playing with it!


## 🗃️Dependencies
this mod NEEDS a [Geckolib!!!!!!!!!!](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)


## 📖But what exactly does this mod add?
This mod adds a bunch of cute plush mob toys! There are a lot of them - and you probably want them all, don't you?? Good... You have to earn them! With your skills!


## ❔How to get them?
We plannning to add **REAL guide book** (not that one waht alredy in game).

But for now I'll give you some advice:

<details>
<summary>Guide</summary>

- TempGuideBook - buy it from the librarian
- Cow - milk one cow 1000 times
- Moobloom - feed the cow 1000 dandelions
- Mooshroom - cut her "hair"
- Brown Mooshroom - Keep Mooshroom in your inventory and get struck by lightning
- Wither Cow - defeat Wither cow (feed cow with wither rose)
- Alliumoom/Cornfloom - build monument (check guide book), place Moobloom and use Allium/CornFlower with Amethyst/Lapis block (also u can use Dandelions with Gold) ((Dont forget to click with flower on PLush))
- Snowman - let rain kill them
- Squid - paint the dog's collar black
- Glow Squid - check guide book
- Bat - feed bat with Enchanted Golden Apple
- Blaze - broke blaze spawner
- Chicken - break the egg
- Fox - let fox kill chicken
- Snow Fox - check guide book
- Dog - tame the wolf
- Frog - destroy the eggs
- Sniffer - they will find it themselves
- Zombie - feed him golden apple
- Husk - located in the pyramid
- Drowned - kill him in nether
- Zombiefied Piglin - Hit him with lightning
- Skeleton/Stray - let them kill their own kind
- Steve - DIE
- Alex - check guide book
- Spider - kill spider with special effect 
- Cave Spider - cure them with milk
- Camel - 
prick them with cactus
- Creeper - let them die from the explosion
- Silverfish - SMASH THE STONE


</details>

## 👁️Can i have a look at them?
Yea - but not all! You can see them [here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/xengimobplush/gallery)


# NOTE

NOT AN OFFICIAL MINECRAFT PRODUCT.

NOT APPROVED BY OR ASSOCIATED WITH MOJANG OR MICROSOFT.
